benefits.description: Achieved noticeable tan over 60 days; increased melanin production for sun protection
Felt full more quickly, ate less
Beard regrowth changed from ginger to dark brown

side_effects.description: Throbbing erections, painful, lasted 40 minutes to 6 hours
Freckles darkened and increased; approximately 30 new freckles appeared
Delayed sleep cycle when injecting at night; switched to daytime injections
Face felt flushed and tingly sensation after injection
Redness at injection point, occasional stinging, small drops of blood
Skin spots, scars, and birthmarks became more prominent

protocol_notes: Genetics: Spanish, Scottish, English, French, 1/128 Aboriginal. MC1r gene, ginger facial hair, dark brown hair. Height 5'11". Total dosage over 65 days: 7 vials. Dosage varied: 500 mcg minimum, 1000 mcg standard daily, 2500 mcg maximum (test dose causing severe painful 6-hour erection). Reconstituted with 2ml water per vial (50 mcg per unit = 20 units per 1000 mcg). Total sun exposure over 60 days: 18-19 hours. Cost: $800 AUD including verified MT2, insulin needles, and swabs. Started 23 Jan 2019. Maintenance dose: once weekly after 60 days. Prescribed through Australian pharmacy after pre-assessment by Australian company. High dose rationale: double recommended due to height and weight (101kg, 5'11"). Location: Melbourne, Australia. User reports adding extra sun exposure with sunscreen as dual protection strategy against skin cancer.
